news.paragraph: Cloudflare (NET) is currently seeing positive sentiment from analysts, with Zacks reporting a predicted 27.73% upside for the stock. No imminent catalysts such as earnings or regulatory actions are identified in the recent headlines. Traders should weigh this analyst optimism against the current spot price of $191.53.
